title: zanthoxylum oreophilum
intro: Zanthoxylum oreophilum, also known as the Himalayan prickly ash, is a small deciduous shrub native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum oreophilum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and blood pressure. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
